name: Cloak of Arachnida
overview: A fine black silk cloak with silvery threads that grants arachnid-like abilities.

properties.material: Made of black silk interwoven with faint, silvery threads
properties.poison_resistance: You have Resistance to Poison damage
properties.spider_climb: You have a Climb Speed equal to your Speed and can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, while leaving your hands free
properties.spider_walk: You can't be caught in webs of any sort and can move through webs as if they were Difficult Terrain

web_spell.enhanced_area: The web created by the spell fills twice its normal area
web_spell.recharge: Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn
